objective: Implement the real GPT-5.4 planner/reviewer adapter, Qdrant ingestion for skills/summaries/repo docs, and the persisted cache manager with invalidation for the standalone context orchestrator.

edits.summary: Added OpenAI planner/embedding configuration and named Qdrant collections.
Added cache, planner request, invalidation, and indexed-document types.
Added persisted cache_entries support in SQLite.
Added cache repository for versioned persisted cache lookups and invalidation.
Added OpenAI Responses API and Embeddings API adapter with structured-output parsing.
Replaced deterministic-only planner with GPT-5.4-backed planner/reviewer plus deterministic fallback.
Added collection creation, payload indexing, point upsert, and search helpers.
Added Qdrant ingestion and semantic search for skills, session summaries, and repo docs, with embedding reuse cached in SQLite.
Wired persisted cache-backed search/prepare flows, deterministic fallbacks, and scope-based invalidation.
Updated MCP tools to use async planner/index/cache flows and persist/index artifacts.
Bootstrapped cache repository, OpenAI service, index service, and startup indexing.

commands.result: passed; startup log reported Qdrant ok=true openai=false collections=7

verification.live_openai_call: not run because OPENAI_API_KEY was not configured in the current shell

notes: The orchestrator now has a real OpenAI planner/embedding adapter, but it falls back cleanly when the API key is absent or a call fails.
Qdrant collection management and ingestion are in place for skills, session summaries, and repo docs.
Prepared context packs, search results, and embedding reuse now persist through the SQLite-backed cache layer.
